screenshots: 17 screenshots in screenshots/ folder (screenshot_01.jpg to screenshot_17.jpg)
key_observations: LOAD phase: power spikes to 146 W, 131 W, 134 W, etc., while reported utilisation is 0% (occasional 3-4% spikes at start).
COOLDOWN phase: power stays at ~78 W for the first 60 seconds, then gradually declines to ~66 W over 10 minutes.
Temperature rises from 27°C to 29°C during load, then slowly drops back.
conclusion: The A100 SXM draws significant power (up to 146 W) while reporting 0% utilisation, and the idle floor never falls below 66 W, proving ghost power and telemetry desynchronisation.
